textByHash.2fd1a09e0b1346006c48108dcf32a6ab7d0c31d6: Creeespy frogs' legs! Get your creeeespy frogs' legs! You want some crispy frogs' legs? Just 10gp.
textByHash.0d692d7f65ca7006651553dfe7ceedafee97f1e6: Looks like your hands are full. You'll have to free up some inventory space before I sell you anything.
